creator: rsecor@seqlogic.com
text:
===>  Building for cronolog-1.6.2_2
Making all in lib
cd .. && automake --gnu --include-deps lib/Makefile
configure.in:30: warning: AC_ARG_PROGRAM invoked multiple times
configure.in:29: your implementation of AM_INIT_AUTOMAKE comes from an
configure.in:29: old Automake version.  You should recreate aclocal.m4
configure.in:29: with aclocal and run automake again.
lib/Makefile.am: required file `./depcomp' not found
/usr/local/share/automake-1.9/am/depend2.am: am__fastdepCC does not appear in AM_CONDITIONAL
/usr/local/share/automake-1.9/am/depend2.am: AMDEP does not appear in AM_CONDITIONAL
*** Error code 63

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/cronolog
make
